Klasse JFrameUtils

java.lang.Object
ch.framedev.lagersystem.utils.JFrameUtils
public class JFrameUtils extends Object
Utility class for creating and styling Swing components with a consistent look and feel across the application. Provides methods for creating styled buttons, panels, and form components, as well as a method for dynamically adjusting JTable column widths based on available space and base width proportions. This class is designed to centralize all UI styling logic, making it easier to maintain a cohesive design and update styles in one place.

    static class 
    JFrameUtils.GradientPanel
    A custom JPanel that paints itself with a horizontal gradient background and rounded corners.
    static class 
    JFrameUtils.RoundedPanel
    A custom JPanel that paints itself with rounded corners and a specified background color.

  • Konstruktordetails

    • JFrameUtils

      public JFrameUtils()

  • Methodendetails

    • adjustColumnWidths

      public static void adjustColumnWidths(JTable table, JScrollPane tableScrollPane, int[] baseColumnWidths)
      Dynamically adjusts the column widths of a JTable based on the available width of its enclosing JScrollPane and a set of base column widths.
      Parameter:
      table - The JTable whose columns should be adjusted
      tableScrollPane - The JScrollPane that contains the JTable, used to determine available width
      baseColumnWidths - An array of integers representing the base widths for each column, used to calculate proportional widths. If fewer values are provided than columns, remaining columns will default to a base width of 100.

    • styleTextField

      public static void styleTextField(JTextField field)

    • styleComboBox

      public static void styleComboBox(JComboBox<String> combo)

    • createRoundedButton

      public static JButton createRoundedButton(String text)

    • createThemeButton

      public static JButton createThemeButton(String text, Color baseBg)

    • applyButtonPalette

      public static void applyButtonPalette(JButton button, Color baseBg)
      Applies a consistent color palette to a JButton, including hover and pressed states, based on a given base background color.
      Parameter:
      button - The JButton to style
      baseBg - The base background color to use for the button (e.g., primary, accent, error)

    • createPrimaryButton

      public static JButton createPrimaryButton(String text)

    • createSecondaryButton

      public static JButton createSecondaryButton(String text)

    • createDangerButton

      public static JButton createDangerButton(String text)
      Creates a "danger" styled button, typically used for destructive actions like delete.
      Parameter:
      text - The button text
      Gibt zurück:
      A JButton with the danger color palette applied

    • createSecondaryButton

    • createPrimaryButton

    • getHeaderPanel

      public static JPanel getHeaderPanel()
      Creates a header panel with a horizontal gradient background and rounded corners.
      Gibt zurück:
      A styled JPanel suitable for use as a header in the application's windows
